question: 查詢目前所有庫存不足的產品
sql:
SELECT id, name, category, current_stock, min_stock, unit
FROM inventory.products
WHERE current_stock < min_stock
ORDER BY (current_stock::float / NULLIF(min_stock, 0)) ASC;

question: 電子產品中目前庫存量最少的 3 個產品
sql:
SELECT id, name, current_stock, min_stock, unit, unit_price
FROM inventory.products
WHERE category = '電子產品'
ORDER BY current_stock ASC
LIMIT 3;

question: 過去 30 天哪些產品庫存不足天數超過 10 天？
sql:
SELECT p.name, p.category, COUNT(*) AS low_stock_days
FROM inventory.daily_snapshots ds
JOIN inventory.products p ON ds.product_id = p.id
WHERE ds.snapshot_date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '30 days'
  AND ds.quantity < ds.min_stock
GROUP BY p.id, p.name, p.category
HAVING COUNT(*) > 10
ORDER BY low_stock_days DESC;

question: 過去 30 天各產品庫存不足的比例是多少？
sql:
SELECT p.name, p.category,
       COUNT(*) AS total_days,
       COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE ds.quantity < ds.min_stock) AS low_days,
       ROUND(COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE ds.quantity < ds.min_stock) * 100.0 / COUNT(*), 1) AS low_pct
FROM inventory.daily_snapshots ds
JOIN inventory.products p ON ds.product_id = p.id
WHERE ds.snapshot_date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '30 days'
GROUP BY p.id, p.name, p.category
ORDER BY low_pct DESC;

question: 上個月庫存異動最頻繁的前 5 個產品
sql:
SELECT p.name, p.category, COUNT(*) AS change_count
FROM inventory.stock_changes sc
JOIN inventory.products p ON sc.product_id = p.id
WHERE DATE_TRUNC('month', sc.created_at) = DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 month')
GROUP BY p.id, p.name, p.category
ORDER BY change_count DESC
LIMIT 5;

question: 過去 7 天的入庫記錄
sql:
SELECT p.name, sc.quantity, sc.note, sc.created_at
FROM inventory.stock_changes sc
JOIN inventory.products p ON sc.product_id = p.id
WHERE sc.change_type = 'in'
  AND sc.created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days'
ORDER BY sc.created_at DESC;

question: 筆記型電腦過去 30 天每週的平均庫存量
sql:
SELECT DATE_TRUNC('week', ds.snapshot_date) AS week_start,
       AVG(ds.quantity) AS avg_stock
FROM inventory.daily_snapshots ds
JOIN inventory.products p ON ds.product_id = p.id
WHERE p.name = '筆記型電腦'
  AND ds.snapshot_date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '30 days'
GROUP BY week_start
ORDER BY week_start;
